items.name: last30days-skill
items.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

items.name: agmsg
items.description: Cross-vendor messaging for CLI AI coding agents — let Claude Code, Codex, Gemini & Copilot talk to each other in one team. Bash + SQLite, no daemon, no framework.

items.name: ccxray
items.description: X-ray vision for AI agent sessions — a transparent HTTP proxy and dashboard for Claude Code

items.name: mempalace-evolve
items.description: Self-evolving memory palace for AI agents — persistent memory with automatic learning, knowledge graph, and multi-agent support

items.name: agent-beacon
items.description: Agent Beacon is the world's first open-source telemetry layer for AI agents wherever they run: locally, in CI, or in the cloud.

items.name: effGen
items.description: [ICML 2026] effGen: Enabling Small Language Models as Capable Autonomous Agents

items.name: OfficeCLI
items.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

items.name: AstrBot
items.description: AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨

items.name: omnigent
items.description: Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time from any device.

items.name: Equibles
items.description: An open-source, self-hosted mini Bloomberg Terminal for AI agents — SEC filings, institutional holdings, insider trading, congressional trades, and short data from a single self-hosted stack.
